evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement enterprise-level data quality strategies and governance frameworks across the organisation
evidence.domain_risk: enterprise-wide data warehouse architecture and implement high-performance data processing systems
evidence.data_team_maturity: Mentor other engineers while leading tool selection, technology evaluation, and architectural roadmap development
evidence.jd_authorship: Drive platform evolution by designing sophisticated ETL/ELT pipelines and orchestrating them via Airflow
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Lead enterprise-wide data warehouse architecture and implement high-performance data processing systems.
evidence.autonomy_level: leading tool selection, technology evaluation, and architectural roadmap development
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Drive platform evolution by designing sophisticated ETL/ELT pipelines and orchestrating them via Airflow
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The phrase 'drive platform evolution' centers the role on advancing and scaling an existing platform rather than building new infrastructure from scratch.
evidence.work_arrangement: hybrid work model that fosters flexibility and work-life balance, with three days per week in-office
evidence.ai_role: Mentor other engineers while leading tool selection, technology evaluation, and architectural roadmap development
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI coding tools, GenAI capabilities, or AI-ready data infrastructure; role is architectural but tool-agnostic.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement enterprise-level data quality strategies and governance frameworks across the organisation
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Uses implement + data quality indicating candidate owns quality practice and governance, not just using tools.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: enterprise-level data quality strategies and governance frameworks
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Governance and data quality framing suggest operational reliability and pipeline stability concerns, but no regulatory/compliance-dominant language.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Multiple rigour signals (data quality, governance frameworks, data quality frameworks) with no velocity signals present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: E-commerce sector with data-driven business decisions but no explicit financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Existing Airflow infrastructure and mentoring responsibilities indicate established data function scaling rather than greenfield build.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (Airflow, BigQuery, Python, SQL) mixed with generic boilerplate phrases like 'cross-functional alignment' and 'strategic mindset'.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The responsibilities focus entirely on building and maintaining the data infrastructure platform that serves internal organizational needs, not on serving commercial, product, or finance stakeholders directly.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic verbs like 'lead' and 'drive,' combined with responsibilities for defining tool selection and architectural roadmap, indicate the role is expected to set direction for the data platform rather than execute direction set by others.
